programs.title: The Chase
programs.sub_title: Gotta Risk It to Get the Brisket
programs.desc: Brandon "The Lightning Bolt" Blackwell, returns as the featured Chaser as he faces off in a trivia battle against a personal stylist, a software consultant, an executive coach and a diversity and inclusion leader.

programs.title: The Wall
programs.desc: Goldin, a fitness guru who started a nonprofit to encourage kids to exercise and read, and fiancée Linda, currently a college professor soon to earn her doctorate, take on the wall.

programs.title: Press Your Luck
programs.desc: Contestants from San Diego, Huntington Beach, Calif. and Rancho Mission Viejo, Calif.

programs.title: Family Feud
programs.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.
